features: Revive Your Eyes, Look Brighter Than Ever ‚Äì Dark circles and puffy eyes? You deserve some relaxation time. This ice pack for face and cold eye mask set targets dark circles and bags under your eyes, reviving tired skin, for a brighter, better you

Soothe and Rejuvenate Your Skin - The full face mask is ideal for those seeking a boost in skin hydration and elasticity. The cooling effects of the face cooler mask and gel eye mask are perfect for soothing stuffy noses, hangovers and reducing stress

Full Face Ice Mask Kit - Relaxing gel face ice pack for both home and travel use. Includes 1 x Freezer Eye Mask, 1 x Cold Face Mask, 4 x Eye Ice Packs, 1 x Cool Bag. Perfect after a long day of work, a tiring journey, or a night with no sleep

Safe and Super Easy - Place the cooling eye mask puffy eye in the fridge or freezer for 1 hr. Wash and clean your face of any makeup, creams, oils, or dirt and gently manipulate the face mask pack / eye cooling mask. Apply it to your face, sit back and relax

Enhanced Design ‚Äî Our cool face mask boasts an increased nose-gap area and Eye Mask height, providing superior under-eye coverage and unmatched comfort for your relaxation. It has durable, thicker fabric edges. Upgrade your self-care routine today
description: Product Description Experience enhanced durability with our mask's sturdy edge stitching, ensuring long-lasting use and reliable performance. Enjoy a perfect fit every time with our elasticated adjustable straps. Our mask stays securely in place, offering comfort for all face shapes. Keep your kit fresh and long-lasting. Featuring odour resistance and mesh pockets, it ensures product longevity and convenient storage. Designed for full face cooling, our mask targets puffy eyes and dark circles. The ice pack provides a soothing and rejuvenating effect. Puffy eyelids and bags begone Late night shift or too much partying? Start your day fresh or unwind in the evening with the Medi Grade Cold Mask Technology! Clear your head and leave the stress behind with cooling gel technology for your eyes or entire face. Perfect for easing morning puffiness and dark circles, our cold packs help you look and feel refreshed. Simply chill the mask, apply to your clean face, adjust the straps, and relax for 5-15 minutes. Enjoy a spa-like experience anytime, anywhere.
